items.title: Solana, Sui and Aptos wallet data targeted in TrapDoor package attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The TrapDoor package attack on Solana, Sui, and Aptos wallets raises concerns about security vulnerabilities, potentially impacting user trust and ecosystem stability.

items.title: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: A 30% drop in Solana's open interest signals reduced market confidence, which could affect liquidity and price dynamics for SOL as altcoins struggle.

items.title: SoFi Launches SoFiUSD Stablecoin Across Ethereum and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: SoFi's launch of the SoFiUSD stablecoin on Solana enhances the ecosystem's utility and could attract more users and liquidity to the platform.
